channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: The Smashing Pumpkins Announce the Rats in a Cage Tour
item.description: 🐀 Pump up the nostalgia vibes! The Smashing Pumpkins are hitting the road on the Rats in a Cage Tour! 🎸🎶 #SmashingPumpkins #RatsInACageTour

item.title: Dr. Hook Frontman Dennis Locorriere Dead At 76
item.description: 🎶 Remembering the legendary Dennis Locorriere from Dr. Hook 🌟 His music will live on forever 💔 #RIPDennisLocorriere

item.title: JPEGMAFIA – “¥ (Yen)”
item.description: 💥 Let's dive into the latest track from JPEGMAFIA - "¥ (Yen)"! 🔥🎶 #NewMusicAlert #JPEGMAFIA

item.title: Paul McCartney Plays SNL Season 51 Finale, Chad Smith Hijacks Will Ferrell’s Monologue
item.description: 🚀 Beatlemania meets Red Hot Chili Peppers spice on SNL! 🌶️🎸 #LegendaryCollab #SNL51Finale

item.title: Bulgaria Wins Eurovision 2026 With Dara’s ‘Bangaranga’
item.description: 🎉 Bulgarians bring the party with Dara's 'Bangaranga' at Eurovision 2026! Let's dance our way to victory! 🕺💃 #Eurovision2026 #BulgariaWins
